metadata.description: Proshli — smart job search across Russia and CIS. We aggregate vacancies from dozens of sources, filter them for you, and help you apply faster.
metadata.keywords: jobs, vacancies, job search, AI, aggregator, Proshli
metadata.ogDescription: One smart search across dozens of job boards. Proshli finds the right roles for you and helps you apply.

footer.tagline: AI job aggregator: one search across dozens of boards, natural-language filters, and Telegram delivery.

landing.heroSubtitle: Proshli pulls vacancies from every major job board in Russia and CIS, understands your search in plain language, and delivers the best matches to Telegram.
landing.featuresTitle: One tool instead of ten browser tabs
landing.featuresSubtitle: Proshli handles the grind of job hunting — aggregation, filtering, notifications, and one-click apply.
landing.feature1Body: Describe your ideal role in plain language — Proshli picks the right filters and surfaces matching vacancies.
landing.feature2Body: We aggregate HeadHunter, SuperJob, Habr Career, Telegram channels, and dozens of niche sources.
landing.feature3Body: Subscribe to a digest — fresh, relevant vacancies arrive straight in Telegram, no noise.
landing.feature4Body: Saved templates and autofill cut your time-to-apply from minutes to seconds.
landing.ctaSectionSubtitle: Create an account in 30 seconds and get your first personalised digest today.

aiChat.placeholder: e.g. looking for a remote middle Python role, 250k+
aiChat.statusIdle: Describe your ideal vacancy in your own words.
aiChat.statusNeedsQuery: Add a few words first — a sentence is plenty.
aiChat.statusNeedsAuth: Sign in to run the AI search.

auth.title: Proshli onboarding
auth.subtitle: An HH-style entry flow with an AI-first twist — sign up and jump straight into smart filters and personalised matching.
auth.stateNote1: JWT is stored in localStorage as `proshli_web_token`.
auth.stateNote3: For the employer flow, open the `Employers` page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: It may have moved or the link is stale. Try the homepage or the vacancy catalogue.

error.title: We couldn't load this page
error.subtitle: We've already been notified. Try refreshing the page or going back to the homepage.

vacancies.feedSubtitle: Familiar HH-style search plus the Proshli twist — natural-language filter composer and prioritised promoted listings.
vacancies.aiStatusInitial: AI composer hasn't been used yet
vacancies.aiNeedsAuth: Sign in first to use the AI composer.
vacancies.emptyState: Empty. Tap "Search vacancies" to load the feed.

seeker.title: Candidate profile
seeker.subtitle: Keep your key details up to date and manage CV variants for different roles.
seeker.statusNeedsAuth: Sign in via the Log in tab first.
seeker.stateNote: CV-version support is already wired up on the backend and will get a dedicated builder in the next iteration.

billing.title: Simple pricing while we're early
billing.subtitle: Use Proshli for free while we're in beta. Upgrade when you want unlimited AI search, Telegram digests, and saved searches.
billing.planFreeDesc: Get a feel for Proshli — vacancy feed and limited AI calls.
billing.planProDesc: For active job-seekers who want the AI on full power.
billing.planTeamDesc: For recruiters and small agencies tracking multiple seats.
billing.faqQ1: Can I pay with a Russian card?
billing.faqA1: Yes — payments go through ЮKassa. Mir, Visa-RU, and Mastercard-RU all work.
billing.faqA2: Yes. Cancellation is one click in Settings — you keep Pro until the end of the paid period.
billing.faqQ3: Do you offer student or NGO discounts?
billing.faqA3: Drop us a line at hello@proshli.ru — happy to help where we can.
billing.faqQ4: What about teams larger than 10 seats?
billing.faqA4: Move to the Team plan — we'll quote you based on seats and integrations needed.

dashboard.title: Your Proshli
dashboard.subtitle: All your activity in one place — saved roles, applications, and AI usage.
dashboard.recentEmpty: Nothing here yet — try searching for vacancies.
dashboard.savedEmpty: You haven't saved any vacancies yet.
dashboard.applicationsEmpty: You haven't applied to anything yet.
dashboard.needsAuth: Sign in to view your dashboard.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, notifications, and account.
settings.profileAboutPlaceholder: A few lines you'd want a recruiter to read.
settings.notificationsTelegramDesc: Daily digest of fresh matching vacancies via @proshli_bot.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting your account removes profile, applications, and saved searches.
settings.needsAuth: Sign in to edit your settings.

employer.title: Employer dashboard
employer.subtitle: Manage vacancies, archive, and promotion. Flow inspired by HH, monetisation and analytics done the Proshli way.
employer.statusNeedsAuth: Sign in as an employer first
